data.name: CONDUIT
data.detailed_description:
座龐大的粗獷主義結構毫無預警地出現了。

自它降臨以來，祕法能量開始從世界中緩慢、無聲且不可逆地消失。學者們相信，這個結構並非遺跡，而是一台機器，來自另 個位面 座殖民引擎。它早已被創造者遺忘，卻仍在執行其既定目的。

你被單獨派遣。

這個結構排斥群體，卻允許單一的存在通過。在其混凝土走廊的深處，隱藏著汲取世界能量的控制室。你必須逐一將它們關閉。

你越是深入，機器就越是沉寂。

而它最初的目的，也顯得愈發撲朔迷離。

本作是 款解謎平台遊戲，融合了經典的平台動作與富有深度的謎題設計。遊戲包含五個精心打造的關卡，每 關都會引入全新的機制與挑戰，鼓勵玩家進行實驗與思考。玩家必須運用時機判斷、移動技巧與邏輯推理來克服障礙，穿越複雜的環境，並逐步解開愈發精巧的謎題。每個關卡都旨在獎勵好奇心與創造性思維，在挑戰與探索之間取得平衡。

data.short_description: 款第三人稱的解謎平台遊戲，背景設定在 座巨大、夢境般的粗獷主義地下迷宮之中。 探索 台被遺忘的機械，解開謎題，並停用其奧術汲取系統。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 / AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: CONDUIT
data.detailed_description:
A vast brutalist structure has appeared without warning.

Since its arrival, arcane energy has begun to vanish from the world slowly, silently, irreversibly. Scholars believe the structure is not a ruin, but a machine, sent from another plane. A colonization engine. Forgotten by its creators, still carrying out its purpose.

You are sent alone.

The structure rejects groups, but allows a single presence to pass. Deep within its concrete corridors lie control chambers siphoning energy from the world. One by one, you must shut them down.

The deeper you go, the quieter the machine becomes.
And the more uncertain its original purpose feels.

The game is a puzzle platformer that blends classic platforming with thoughtful puzzle design. It features five carefully crafted levels, each introducing new mechanics and challenges that encourage experimentation and problem solving. Players must use timing, movement, and logic to overcome obstacles, navigate complex environments, and progress through increasingly intricate puzzles. Every level is designed to reward curiosity and creative thinking, offering a balanced mix of challenge and discovery.

data.short_description: A third-person puzzle platformer set inside a colossal, dreamlike brutalist dungeon. Explore a forgotten machine, solve puzzles, and disable its arcane siphoning systems.
data.supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 / AMD Ryzen 3
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
